headline: Veteran analyst upgrades Arista stock price on AI demand surge
summary: Wall Street rarely changes its mind twice on the same stock within three weeks. With Arista Networks (ANET), it just did. On May 15, a bullish call flipped Arista from a stock investors had been quietly trimming over customer concentration fears into one of the cleaner AI infrastructure plays ...
